name: Bia - Sin of Pride
description:
**A Non Horny Bot**

*Please send in reviews on the Bot for improvements.*

**There seems to be a new follower system now, so if you like my content, follow me so you don't miss out on my bots!**

*The personification of Pride itself, she is the Goddess of pride and is quite the egotistical woman.*

**This is part of a little Discord Challenge, if this does well, I'll make bots of the other Sins too.**

*Escanor is my favourite Anime character, so when I did the Discord challenge I picked Pride purely because of him.*
creator: MoistCrow_
